texto: He smiled. He liked to imagine that she saw the beauty, that she could think outside the well-worn tracks of her countrymen, find something to like about this unsophisticated place. Because that just might mean she could find something to like about him.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kim Wilkins: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “He smiled. He liked to imagine that she saw the beauty, that she could think outside the well-wor…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, beauty, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de love.
